update.name: CVE-2026-23416-POC
update.description: POC for CVE-2026-23416 (linux kernel 6.17 – linux kernel 7 rc5) - vulnerability discovered by Antonius

update.name: CVE-2025-49844
update.description: 🚨 Exploit the CVE-2025-49844 Redis Lua interpreter UAF vulnerability to execute arbitrary shellcode and gain persistent backdoor access.

update.name: CVE-2025-61882-CVE-2025-61884
update.description: 🔍 Detect vulnerabilities CVE-2025-61882 and CVE-2025-61884 in Oracle E-Business Suite to help secure your systems from potential remote code execution threats.

update.name: CVE-2025-32463_chwoot
update.description: 🔍 Demonstrate the CVE-2025-32463 privilege-escalation flaw in sudo's chroot feature with this minimal, reproducible proof of concept environment.

update.name: CVE-2025-31258-PoC
update.description: 🔓 Explore CVE-2025-31258 with this PoC demonstrating partial sandbox escape using RemoteViewServices for practical 1-day security practice.

update.name: lab-cve-2016-15042
update.description: 🛠️ Validate and demonstrate CVE-2016-15042 with a Dockerized lab for unauthenticated file uploads in WordPress file managers.

update.name: lab-cve-2020-0610
update.description: 🔍 Create a safe lab environment for testing CVE-2020-0610, a critical RCE vulnerability in Windows RD Gateway, with minimal disruption using DTLS techniques.

update.name: CVE-2025-54253-Exploit-Demo
update.description: 🐙 CVE-2025-54253 exploit demo for Adobe AEM Forms on JEE: OGNL injection to RCE with PoC, Python 3.10 exploit code, reproducer and mitigation guidance.

update.name: CVE-2025-54424
update.description: CVE-2025-54424: 1Panel TLS client cert bypass enables RCE via forged CN 'panel_client' using a bundled scanning and exploitation tool. Affected: <= v2.0.5. 🔐

update.name: CVE-2025-32463_chwoot
update.description: Demonstrate CVE-2025-32463 with this PoC for sudo's chroot feature. Explore the exploit and its impact on vulnerable sudo versions. 🐱💻🔒

update.name: CVE-2026-41940-Exploit-PoC
update.description: Test authentication bypass vulnerabilities in cPanel and WHM using this proof of concept exploit tool written in Go.

update.name: CVE-2026-31431-Linux-Copy-Fail
update.description: Exploit CVE-2026-31431 on Linux using a Rust implementation to achieve local privilege escalation via an arbitrary page cache write primitive.

update.name: CVE-2026-2991
update.description: Explore a PoC for CVE-2026-2991, an auth bypass in KiviCare 4.1.2 and earlier via the patient social-login REST endpoint

update.name: CVE-2026-31802
update.description: Demonstrate and analyze the CVE-2026-31802 path traversal vulnerability in npm tar, enabling arbitrary file overwrite via symlink extraction.

update.name: cve-2025-66398
update.description: Demonstrate exploitation of Signal K Server CVE-2025-66398 allowing unauthenticated attackers to inject backdoor and enable remote code execution.

update.name: CVE-2026-2472-Vertex-AI-SDK-Google-Cloud
update.description: Expose and detail an unauthenticated stored XSS vulnerability in the Google Cloud Vertex AI Python SDK affecting versions 1.98.0 to 1.130.9.

update.name: CVE-2026-25643
update.description: Exploit Frigate NVR ≤0.16.3 to execute commands remotely by abusing a configuration flaw without needing shell access or output capture.

update.name: CVE-2025-69985
update.description: Exploit CVE-2025-69985 to bypass authentication and execute remote commands on FUXA versions ≤ 1.2.8 via the /api/runscript endpoint.

update.name: CVE-2026-2441-PoC
update.description: Demonstrate a proof-of-concept exploit for CVE-2026-2441, a high-risk Chrome use-after-free vulnerability in the Blink CSS engine.

update.name: CVE-2026-20841
update.description: 🛠 Demonstrate remote code execution in Windows Notepad via markdown links exploiting unsecured URL protocols.

update.name: CVE-2026-20841-PoC
update.description: 🛠 Demonstrate remote code execution in Windows Notepad versions below 11.2510 using the CVE-2026-20841 proof of concept.

update.name: CVE-2025-2304
update.description: 🛠️ Exploit CVE-2025-2304 in Camaleon CMS easily with this Python script for privilege escalation, tested on version 2.9.0.

update.name: cve-2025-8088
update.description: 🛠 Exploit CVE-2025-8088 with this Python tool to generate malicious WinRAR archives that ensure payload persistence in Windows startup folders.

update.name: CVE-2025-6554
update.description: 🔍 Demonstrate and validate the `addressof` and `fakeobj` primitives in the V8 sandbox for advanced security research on CVE-2025-6554.
